goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called curry prince. Make sure you get phone number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool. Make sure you get entrance fee and address. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the attraction by 20:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I hope so. My brother recommended an eatery called Curry Prince. Can you help me find it?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Curry Prince is an Indian restaurant in the east part of town. It is moderately priced. The address is 451 Newmarket Road Fen Ditton.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Could I have their phone number as well?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes of course. the Curry Prince's phone number is 01223566388.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. I am also looking for places to go. Is there any swimming pool you can locate for me?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure. We have the Abbey Pool there in the same area as your restaurant. There are three others in other parts of town.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the entrance fee for Abbey Pool? Can I also get the address?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, my system doesn't tell me the entrance fee. Address is Pool Way, Whitehill Road, Off Newmarket Road. Anything else you need?

non-categorical.value: y system does n't tell me the entrance fee

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a taxi that will let me leave the pool at 20:45 to take me to the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have booked you a Taxi that fits your needs. Would you like the Contact number or Car model?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Both, please! I can't wait to explore Cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: A blue skoda will be picking you up at 20:45. Their contact number is 07775057511. Do you need any further assistance?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That will be all for today. Thank you for your help!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Have a great day!

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve portuguese food and should be in the cheap price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 19:00 on thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and area. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Hello I am looking for a nice restaurant nearby that serve Portuguese , but I would also like the prices very affordable

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Nandos is in the south area and they have wonderful Portuguese food! Would you like me to book that?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are they a cheap restaurant? I want to save money for all the other plans we have during our trip.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: yes. nandos city centre	fits your wants.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great! Could you book a table there for 5 people on Thursday? We'd like to eat at 19:00.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your table has been reserved for 15 minutes and your reference number is M1K2Y25N on Thursday at 19:00 for 5 people.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. I also want to go to a museum.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are several museums available. What part of town would you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: It can be in any area. Could you suggest one and give me some information about it, please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The ruskin gallery is in the centre of town at anglia ruskin university, east road. The phone number and postcode are 01245493131 and cb11pt. Admission is free. Need anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a taxi between the two places.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Where would you like to depart from and what time would you like to leave and arrive by?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need to arrive at the restaurant by the booking time.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay you got it. I've booked you a yellow ford. The contact number is 07887698411

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great!  That is all I needed.  Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No problem.  Enjoy your stay.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get postcode, area, and phone number. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range. The restaurant should serve asian oriental food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 11:45 on wednesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you tell me the different museums please

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure there are 23 museums. Are you interested in one with free entry?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Entrance fee doesn't really matter to me.  Pick your favorite and let me know the postcard, area, and phone number please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'd recommend the cafe jello gallery. It's on cafe jello gallery, 13 magdalene street, postcode cb30af. Their phone number is 01223312112.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What area can I find cafe jello gallery?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Cafe Jello Gallery is in the west.  The address is 13 magdalene street.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok, just gathering information for now, thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: My pleasure. Please call us back if you need anything else.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, have a good one.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You as well. Have a great trip, and thanks for using Cambridge Towninfo centre.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks again. Bye!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are welcome. Goodbye.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre. Make sure you get postcode, entrance fee, and phone number. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the north and should serve northern european food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 18:00 on thursday. If the booking fails how about 17:00. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like to go to the theatre, can you tell me about what's available in Cambridge, please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 5 theaters in the whole of Cambridge, do you have a specific area in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I prefer the center of town

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are four theaters showing up in the centre part of town.  It looks like one of them is a arts theater.  Do you want info?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes please! What's the postcode, fee, and number?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Cambridge Arts Theatre is located in 6 Saint Edward's Passage Postcode cb23pj, phone 01223503333. There isn't information about entrance fee.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would also like a restaurant that is in the North area that serve Northern European food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, we don't seem to have any listings that match your criteria. Would you like to look for a different type of cuisine or a different area of the city?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about a Chinese food restaurant?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I would recommend Hakka.  It is in the north area and I've heard it's great.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: OK go ahead and book a table for 3 people at 18:00 on thursday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I do apologize, but they're all booked up. Would you like to try another day or time slot?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, can we try 17:00?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: That time was successful. Your table will be reserved for 15 minutes. The reference number is: L85JERQH. Anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please.  I'd like a taxi between the two places to arrive by 17:00.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance:
Booking completed!
Booked car type	:	grey bmw
Contact number	:	07714877467
is there anything else i can help you with?

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south and should be in the type of swimmingpool. If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of entertainment. Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the expensive price range. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 14:30 on saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking forward to trying local restaurants but would like help finding a place to go in town. I would like it to be in the south and a swimmingpool

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, I'm experiencing a system error. Could you please restate your request?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want a place to go in the south, a swimmingpool. Or another type of entertainment, if there is no pool?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, but there are not any swimming pools in the south area.There are 2 parks and a cinema. Are you interested in one of these? Or something else?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The entrance fee isn't shown. The phone number for Nusha is 01223902158. Is there anything else I can do for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, can you please find me a good Indian restaurant in the same area as the attraction? Money is no object.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, the Taj Tandoori is a great Indian place in the south area of the city. It's expensive, but definitely worth it. Would you like a reservation there?

turns.utterance: Sure. Book it for 14:30 on saturday for 3 people.

turns.utterance: I would also like to book a taxi please.

turns.utterance: From Nusha to Taj Tandoori?

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Ok, will do.  Is there anything else I can do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, the taxi needs to arrive at Taj Tandoori by 14:30. Can you let me know what type of car will be coming and give me the contact number, please?
